description: Lahman Baseball Batting Avg by Batter & Pitcher Handedness
skip_reason: Already-aggregated season-level batting statistics (H, AB, HR, etc.) — no individual-level binary outcome. All outcome columns are continuous counts. While H/AB could proxy a hit rate, the data is pre-aggregated per player-season, so there are no individual plate appearance rows to aggregate differently. No natural treatment/exposure grouping either.
